title: ThirstWasTaken-UnofficialFabric
description: This is the unofficial version of the mod Thirst-Mod, ported to the Fabric platform
body:
This is the unofficial version of the mod [Thirst Was Taken](https://modrinth.com/mod/thirst-was-taken), ported to the Fabric platform, adds a thirst mechanic to the game 💧 Water Purity Water can have 4 different levels of purity, depending on where it was harvested
If you drink non-purified water, depending on the purity level, you will have a chance to get sick, or worse, poisoned. Water can be purified on a campfire or a furnace: a campfire will purify it by 1 unit, and a furnace by 2 (meaning it will go from Dirty to Acceptable, for instance). ![campfire](https://github.com/StarWindv/TWT-U/blob/main/example/campfire.png?raw=true) 💧 HUD Overlay ![thirst hud](https://github.com/StarWindv/TWT-U/blob/main/example/ThirstHUD.png?raw=true) 💧 What's the difference? - You cannot directly boil bottled water over the campfire - You cannot use a campfire or a furnace to boil the bucket of water These issues are caused by differences in platforms. I will try to fix them 💧Collaboration with other mods I'm very sorry, but unfortunately I don't have enough time to complete this task But no one can be sure. What if one day I have some free time? Right?
